recommendations.summary: The channel is performing strongly with AI-related content, achieving views significantly above average. 'Shock' hooks appear to be particularly effective, outperforming 'question' hooks, although the confidence from the A/B test is still low.
script_style_tips: Use strong, opinionated statements to create immediate shock and grab attention.
Pose direct, relatable questions that resonate with viewer concerns about AI.
Keep content concise and to the point, delivering the core message quickly.
recommendations.next_experiment_suggestion: A/B test specific visual elements during the 'shock' hook (e.g., rapid cuts, text overlay, or unexpected imagery).

learning.analysis_summary: The channel is performing strongly with AI-related content, achieving views significantly above average. 'Shock' hooks appear to be particularly effective, outperforming 'question' hooks, although the confidence from the A/B test is still low.

active_experiments.name: Hook Type: Question vs Shock
active_experiments.hypothesis: Question hooks get more comments; shock hooks get more views.

active_experiments.name: Title Length: Short vs Descriptive
active_experiments.hypothesis: Short titles perform better on mobile discovery.
